user_stories.title: User can rate motivational phrases
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to rate motivational phrases generated by the application with a score from 0 to 5 on the screen where the phrases are presented, so that I can provide feedback on their quality.

technical_requirements: Add a rating UI component (e.g., stars or numeric input) on the phrase display screen allowing scores from 0 to 5.
Implement backend API endpoint to receive and store user ratings associated with each motivational phrase.
Validate rating input to ensure it is an integer between 0 and 5.
Update database schema to store ratings linked to phrases and users if applicable.
Ensure middleware handles validation, authentication, and error handling for the rating endpoint.
Update frontend to display average rating or user rating for each phrase if applicable.
risks: User input validation errors leading to invalid ratings being stored.
Potential performance impact if rating data grows significantly without proper indexing.
User authentication and authorization issues affecting rating submissions.
UI complexity in integrating rating component seamlessly with existing phrase display.
acceptance_criteria: Users can submit a rating from 0 to 5 for each motivational phrase displayed.
Ratings are validated and stored correctly in the backend.
The rating UI is intuitive and accessible on the phrase display screen.
Error messages are shown for invalid rating inputs.
Average or user-specific ratings are displayed appropriately if applicable.
All new endpoints and UI components pass automated tests.
